text.title: Stratified sampling recipe — procedure
text.summary: Six steps from manifest + traffic + budget to a versioned recipe.

step.name: Enumerate strata
step.input: Eval manifest JSONL with cohort/tool/intent/difficulty fields.
step.action: Group-by the declared stratification keys; produce the set of non-empty strata.
step.output: List of stratum keys with eval-set counts.

step.name: Fetch traffic distribution
step.action: Aggregate calls by the same keys; compute `traffic_share` per stratum.

step.name: Set N_daily
step.action: If $/day: N_daily = floor(budget / cost_per_case). If cases/day: N_daily = direct.
step.decision-gate: If N_daily < 2 × num_strata × tail_floor: warn — budget cannot satisfy floor across all strata. Either raise budget or drop low-priority strata.

step.name: Apply proportional+floor with head cap
step.action: For each stratum: quota_raw = round(N_daily * share); quota = max(tail_floor, min(quota_raw, floor(N_daily * head_cap_share))). Re-normalise so sum(quota) == N_daily (spillover into tail strata).

step.name: Set seed and serialise
step.action: Assign integer seed (default `seed = hash(version) & 0xFFFFFFFF` or fixed `42` for the first version). Serialise per the JSON Schema in 02-output-contract.

step.name: Diff vs prior recipe and decide refresh
step.action: Compute Δshare per stratum. If max|Δ| < abs_share_threshold AND age(parent) < max_age_days: carry-forward parent; else publish candidate, set parent_version = parent.version, bump version.
step.output: Final recipe written to eval/sampling-recipe.json. Log decision (carry-forward vs refresh).
step.decision-gate: If >2 new strata appeared: bump MAJOR; if only quotas changed: bump MINOR.
